plugins.name: Clock
plugins.description: Adds a live clock to the header. Tiny demo plugin showing how to register a header widget and clean up on unmount.
plugins.author: ttyview

plugins.name: Pane Counter
plugins.description: Shows total pane count + how many are idle (>5 min). Demonstrates listening to platform events (panes-updated) from a plugin.
plugins.author: ttyview

plugins.name: Solarized Dark
plugins.description: Ethan Schoonover's classic Solarized Dark palette mapped onto ttyview's CSS variables. Demonstrates the theme contribution point.
plugins.author: ttyview

plugins.name: Quick Keys
plugins.description: Adds a horizontal row of common key buttons (Esc / Tab / Ctrl-C / arrows) above the input — useful for driving Claude Code, vim, or any TUI from a phone where these keys aren't on the soft keyboard.
plugins.author: ttyview

plugins.name: Plain Text
plugins.description: Alternative terminal view that renders the pane as plain text rows (no per-cell DOM, no colors). Activate from Settings → Plugins → Terminal views to see how the platform supports radically different render strategies. Lighter than cell-grid; loses fg/bg color but keeps live updates.
plugins.author: ttyview

plugins.name: Claude Code
plugins.description: Renders the active pane's Claude Code conversation directly from the JSONL transcript on disk — chat-bubble UI with user / assistant / tool-use turns. Polls every 2 seconds for new turns. Pair with the Terminal Green theme for a CRT-like look.
plugins.author: ttyview

plugins.name: Terminal Green
plugins.description: Classic green-phosphor-on-black terminal palette. Pairs especially well with the Claude Code view to make it look like a vintage CRT.
plugins.author: ttyview

plugins.name: Nord
plugins.description: Arctic, north-bluish color palette by Arctic Ice Studio. Calm, low-contrast — easy on the eyes for long mobile reading sessions.
plugins.author: ttyview

plugins.name: Pinned Tabs
plugins.description: Adds a horizontal tab row above the grid for quick switching between pinned panes. Tap to switch, '+' to pin the current pane, long-press to unpin. State persists across reloads, by session-name (so the tabs survive tmux server restarts that mint new pane ids).
plugins.author: ttyview

plugins.name: App Name
plugins.description: Renders the daemon instance name (set via the daemon's --app-name flag, populated by ttyview-manager from each app's manifest) in the header. Useful for telling apart multiple ttyview tabs at a glance.
plugins.author: ttyview

plugins.name: Pane Picker
plugins.description: Replaces the default arbitrary-order pane picker list with a Recent + All sections layout. Recency tracked per-browser (localStorage) by session name so it survives tmux server restarts. Configurable via Settings → Pane Picker — toggle the recent section, set its size (1-20), choose alphabetical or pane-id sort for the all-section.
plugins.author: ttyview

plugins.name: Image Paste
plugins.description: Pastes / drops / picks images into the chat input. Uploads them to the daemon, then on Send hands ids + caption to /api/uploads/send so the host pastes `<text> [image: /abs/path]` into the tmux pane — the missing piece for Claude Code over SSH. 📷 button in the input accessory row works on mobile (gallery / camera picker); Cmd-V and drag-drop work on desktop.
plugins.author: ttyview

plugins.name: Voice Dictation
plugins.description: 🎤 button in the keys row that transcribes speech into the Message box via the browser's Web Speech API. Continuous mode — each finished phrase appends with a trailing space; optionally say 'enter' at the end of a phrase to submit. Settings: language + say-enter toggle. Needs microphone permission per site.
plugins.author: ttyview

plugins.name: Display Toggles
plugins.description: Adds a 'Display' settings tab with toggles for built-in chrome — currently the font-control buttons (A− / ↔ / A+) which are hidden by default. Future toggles for other header buttons (scroll-to-bottom, refresh) live here too.
plugins.author: ttyview
